creator: ob@seicom.NET
text:
tcpblast localhost 100
	....................................................................................................
	100 1024-byte blocks in 13 msec.
	Throughput  =  63015384.6 kbit/s  =  7876923.1 kByte/s  =  7.7 MByte/s

tcpblast shows

	kbit/s, kByte/s and MByte/s

but the values are

	kbit/s, Byte/s and MByte/s

The Value in the middle shows Byte per second and has title kByte per second.
With the correction the middle value shows kByte for real.

	/tcpblast localhost 100
	....................................................................................................
	100 1024-byte blocks in 13 msec.
	Throughput  =  63015384.6 kbit/s  =  7876.9 kByte/s  =  7.7 MByte/s
